title: Problems when using the STDDEV_POP function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 FLOAT, c3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 2.5, true);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, NULL, false);
SELECT STDDEV_POP(c2) FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT STDDEV_POP(c2) FROM t1 WHERE c1 IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT STDDEV_POP(c2) FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results from STDDEV_POP with three-valued logic
